name: @ancplua/typespec-agent-framework
description: TypeSpec emitters for Microsoft Agent Framework's declarative agent and workflow YAML, verified by loading the output through Microsoft's own agent and workflow loaders.

scripts.compile: npm run build:emitters && tsp compile main.tsp
scripts.lint: npm run build:emitters && tsp compile main.tsp --no-emit --warn-as-error
scripts.test:roundtrip: npm run compile && dotnet run --project tests/MafRoundTrip -- generated/maf/weather-bot.agent.yaml
scripts.test:workflows: npm run compile && node tools/workflow-equiv.mjs && dotnet run --project tests/MafWorkflowRoundTrip
